title: Sinners Jesus will receive
textAttribution: Text: Erdmann Neumeister (1671–1756), Emma Frances Shuttleworth Bevan (1827–1909).
publicDomainBasis: Erdmann Neumeister (1671–1756), Emma Frances Shuttleworth Bevan (1827–1909), James McGranahan (1840–1907). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Sinners Jesus will receive;
Sound this word of grace to all
Who the heavenly pathway leave,
All who linger, all who fall.

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
Now my heart condemns me not,
Pure before the law I stand;
He who cleansed me from all spot,
Satisfied its last demand.

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Christ receiveth sinful men,
Even me with all my sin;
Purged from every spot and stain,
Glory I shall enter in.
